testCases.name: Verify search input field type is 'text'
testCases.expected: The search input field should be present and have its 'type' attribute set to 'text'.

testCases.name: Verify 'Login' call-to-action is visible in the header
testCases.expected: The header should contain a visible 'Login' text as a call-to-action.

testCases.name: Verify 'Men's Fashion' category is present in navigation
testCases.expected: The category navigation strip should include 'Men's Fashion'.

testCases.name: Verify 'Deal Of The Day' section title is present
testCases.expected: A section titled 'Deal Of The Day' should be prominently displayed on the page.

testCases.name: Verify 'Download App' button is present in the header
testCases.expected: The header should contain a button labeled 'Download App'.

testCases.name: Verify copyright notice is present in the footer
testCases.expected: The footer should contain the correct copyright statement.
testCases.value: Copyright © 2021, AceVector Limited. All Rights Reserved
